author: bosulmun
content:
Hi, I opened a PR for fcuV4 and getblobsV4 on prysm (with help of claude). This is almost similar to what I used for my local simulation, with some rebasing job based on the current develop branch. However I am observing some new errors when I ran it with geth. I will investigate them. Feel free to check <@833706406699073536> <@1425510242749251606>

https://github.com/OffchainLabs/prysm/pull/17051
